title: Bhavnagar, Gujarat — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bhavnagar, Gujarat: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.

Overview

Bhavnagar is a city in Gujarat with a population of 650,000. A coastal city in Gujarat, known for its shipbuilding industry, historic palaces, and proximity to the Gir Forest National Park.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
